name: A Man Of Few Words
summary: Darvo needs your help again. Save one of his best contractors from Grineer execution.
description: Darvo needs your help again. Save one of his best contractors from Grineer execution.

name: Angels Of The Zariman
summary: From depths beyond reason a Voice had spoken, and its echoes would not be denied. No longer fully concealed by the ever-shifting Void, the Zariman now rests between worlds. A haunting song resounds across the System. It is time for an overdue confrontation with the past...
description: From depths beyond reason a Voice had spoken, and its echoes would not be denied. No longer fully concealed by the ever-shifting Void, the Zariman now rests between worlds. A haunting song resounds across the System. It is time for an overdue confrontation with the past...

name: Apostasy Prologue
summary: Inspect your personal quarters upon finishing the Chains of Harrow quest.
description: Inspect your personal quarters upon finishing the Chains of Harrow quest.

name: Awakening
summary:
The Tenno: monuments of an ancient warrior caste.

For generations you've slept, with no call to wake you.

Until now.
description:
The Tenno: monuments of an ancient warrior caste.

For generations you've slept, with no call to wake you.

Until now.

drops.location: The Descendia: Infernum 20 Triple Arcane Rewards

name: Call Of The Tempestarii
summary: Void Storms gather in Corpus lanes... could a mysterious vessel somehow be the cause?
description: Void Storms gather in Corpus lanes... could a mysterious vessel somehow be the cause?

name: Chains Of Harrow
summary: A strange transmission leads deep into the dark world of Red Veil mysticism. What evils will be found there and what do they want?
description: A strange transmission leads deep into the dark world of Red Veil mysticism. What evils will be found there and what do they want?

name: Chimera Prologue
summary: Investigate your personal quarters upon completion of The Sacrifice.
description: Investigate your personal quarters upon completion of The Sacrifice.

name: Clan Key
summary: Unlocks access to your Clan's Dojo
description: Unlocks access to your Clan's Dojo

name: Erra
summary: Erra quest imported from WFCD static data.

name: Heart Of Deimos
summary: Deimos emerges in Martian orbit, completely overrun by the Infestation... yet among the writhing mass, a distress call comes over a most ancient carrier wave...
description: Deimos emerges in Martian orbit, completely overrun by the Infestation... yet among the writhing mass, a distress call comes over a most ancient carrier wave...

name: Howl Of The Kubrow
summary: You are Tenno, you deserve a Kubrow by your side.
description: You are Tenno, you deserve a Kubrow by your side.

name: Jade Shadows
summary: Struggling to understand the oldest and deepest secret from his past, Stalker finds himself allied with sworn enemies on the troubling road toward uncovering the truth… and averting an incalculable loss.
description: Struggling to understand the oldest and deepest secret from his past, Stalker finds himself allied with sworn enemies on the troubling road toward uncovering the truth… and averting an incalculable loss.

name: Mask Of The Revenant
summary: The Unum chooses Nakak to receive a strange mask. A mask that leads to even stranger visions. What lost story does the Unum want to tell?
description: The Unum chooses Nakak to receive a strange mask. A mask that leads to even stranger visions. What lost story does the Unum want to tell?

name: Mutalist Alad V Assassinate
summary: Put an end to Alad V and his Mutalist experiments
description: Put an end to Alad V and his Mutalist experiments

name: Natah
summary: Strange drones have appeared in the Origin System, help the Lotus find out what they are and who sent them.
description: Strange drones have appeared in the Origin System, help the Lotus find out what they are and who sent them.

name: Octavia's Anthem
summary: Build the Mandachord and find the cause of Cephalon Suda’s erratic behavior.
description: Build the Mandachord and find the cause of Cephalon Suda’s erratic behavior.

name: Once Awake
summary: Intercepted Grineer communications reveal that Grineer have been experimenting with some sort of bio weapon. You must investigate.
description: Intercepted Grineer communications reveal that Grineer have been experimenting with some sort of bio weapon. You must investigate.

name: Patient Zero
summary: Find Alad V’s laboratory and put a stop to his madness.
description: Find Alad V’s laboratory and put a stop to his madness.

name: Rising Tide
summary: To face a growing threat, a long dormant Cephalon calls on you to reconstruct an Orokin-era interceptor craft: the Railjack.
description: To face a growing threat, a long dormant Cephalon calls on you to reconstruct an Orokin-era interceptor craft: the Railjack.

name: Sands Of Inaros
summary: Help Baro Ki'Teer raid an ancient Martian tomb for a mysterious treasure.
description: Help Baro Ki'Teer raid an ancient Martian tomb for a mysterious treasure.

name: Saya's Vigil
summary: On the Plains of Eidolon a mystery has lain buried for years: one that will mend or destroy a heart, and open the door to a hidden past.
description: On the Plains of Eidolon a mystery has lain buried for years: one that will mend or destroy a heart, and open the door to a hidden past.

name: Stolen Dreams
summary: Find the thief Maroo and uncover the secrets of the Arcane Codices.
description: Find the thief Maroo and uncover the secrets of the Arcane Codices.

name: The Archwing
summary: The Balor Fomorians are coming but we are ready. Through your efforts we finally have a working Archwing prototype and I am sending you the blueprint. However, your task is not yet complete. You still must discover the component parts.
description: The Balor Fomorians are coming but we are ready. Through your efforts we finally have a working Archwing prototype and I am sending you the blueprint. However, your task is not yet complete. You still must discover the component parts.

name: The Deadlock Protocol
summary: A power struggle within the Corpus elite has erupted. Seeking control, Nef Anyo looks to the past... to the very origins of the Corpus itself.
description: A power struggle within the Corpus elite has erupted. Seeking control, Nef Anyo looks to the past... to the very origins of the Corpus itself.

name: The Glast Gambit
summary: Nef Anyo has stolen the children of the Mycona Colony and it is up to you to get them back. You must challenge Nef on The Index and beat him at his own game. But Tenno, beware, not all is as it seems.
description: Nef Anyo has stolen the children of the Mycona Colony and it is up to you to get them back. You must challenge Nef on The Index and beat him at his own game. But Tenno, beware, not all is as it seems.

name: The Hex
summary: The desperate hunt for Albrecht Entrati has led the Drifter to the city of Höllvania on December 31st, 1999. Despite the Scaldra lockdown in the face of the Techrot menace, the citizens do their best to celebrate. But this has all happened before... and ended in disaster.
description: The desperate hunt for Albrecht Entrati has led the Drifter to the city of Höllvania on December 31st, 1999. Despite the Scaldra lockdown in the face of the Techrot menace, the citizens do their best to celebrate. But this has all happened before... and ended in disaster.

name: The Hex Finale
summary: A chance to rewrite history and avert disaster.
description: A chance to rewrite history and avert disaster.

name: The Jordas Precept
summary: Ordis is determined to help a fellow Cephalon overcome a ship wide infestation.
description: Ordis is determined to help a fellow Cephalon overcome a ship wide infestation.

name: The Limbo Theorem
summary:
The Limbo Theorem quest cannot be completed without an Archwing

Piece together the Limbo Theorem to uncover its source
description:
The Limbo Theorem quest cannot be completed without an Archwing

Piece together the Limbo Theorem to uncover its source

name: The Lotus Eaters
summary: A strange call comes from beyond and must not go unanswered.
description: A strange call comes from beyond and must not go unanswered.

name: The New Strange
summary: Work with Cephalon Simaris to find the source of a mysterious voice.
description: Work with Cephalon Simaris to find the source of a mysterious voice.

name: The New War
summary:
The Sentient armada has emerged from the Veil Proxima in shocking numbers.

At their head, Natah, once the trusted guide 'Lotus', now seemingly in thrall to Ballas and her brother Erra.

Across worlds and space, the Tenno and their unlikely alliance launch a final assault to take the Sentient mothership... where Natah awaits.
description:
The Sentient armada has emerged from the Veil Proxima in shocking numbers.

At their head, Natah, once the trusted guide 'Lotus', now seemingly in thrall to Ballas and her brother Erra.

Across worlds and space, the Tenno and their unlikely alliance launch a final assault to take the Sentient mothership... where Natah awaits.

name: The Old Peace
summary: Albrecht Entrati's trail leads beyond the Origin System. Only by delving into the past can the path ahead be made clear - but buried secrets can be deadly.
description: Albrecht Entrati's trail leads beyond the Origin System. Only by delving into the past can the path ahead be made clear - but buried secrets can be deadly.

name: The Sacrifice
summary: A tortured vision sends the Operator on the hunt for a Warframe unlike any other.
description: A tortured vision sends the Operator on the hunt for a Warframe unlike any other.

name: The Second Dream
summary: The Sentient Hunhow seeks to destroy the Tenno by exploiting long forgotten secrets.
description: The Sentient Hunhow seeks to destroy the Tenno by exploiting long forgotten secrets.

name: The Silver Grove
summary: New Loka seeks help protecting a sacred forest from Grineer incursions, but are they ready to face the forest’s true nature?
description: New Loka seeks help protecting a sacred forest from Grineer incursions, but are they ready to face the forest’s true nature?

name: The Teacher
summary: Corpus incursions into Grineer territory lead to showdown with a forgotten rival.
description: Corpus incursions into Grineer territory lead to showdown with a forgotten rival.

name: The War Within
summary: A disturbance in the Somatic Link prompts the Lotus to send operatives back to the Tenno Reservoir.
description: A disturbance in the Somatic Link prompts the Lotus to send operatives back to the Tenno Reservoir.

name: The Waverider
summary: When tragedy strikes, the Ventkids search for hope in a long-lost story.
description: When tragedy strikes, the Ventkids search for hope in a long-lost story.

name: Veilbreaker
summary: Daughter Entrati gets more than she bargained for when she enlists the Tenno to investigate a call for reinforcements aboard a Narmer Murex.
description: Daughter Entrati gets more than she bargained for when she enlists the Tenno to investigate a call for reinforcements aboard a Narmer Murex.

name: Vor's Prize
summary:
MY QUEENS -

You were right, the Tenno threat is real. We found one drifting near Earth but the Lotus knew we were coming. She purged the Cryo moments before we had them and sent a squad of Tenno to break our assault.

They escaped. We are working on tracing them. Separate this Tenno from the flock and it should be easy to kill. We shattered its Warframe and expect such an abrupt Cryo purge will have damaged its memories.

We anxiously await punishment for failing this task.

- VOR
description:
MY QUEENS -

You were right, the Tenno threat is real. We found one drifting near Earth but the Lotus knew we were coming. She purged the Cryo moments before we had them and sent a squad of Tenno to break our assault.

They escaped. We are working on tracing them. Separate this Tenno from the flock and it should be easy to kill. We shattered its Warframe and expect such an abrupt Cryo purge will have damaged its memories.

We anxiously await punishment for failing this task.

- VOR

name: Vox Solaris
summary: Eudico would do anything to keep her people safe, but will she stand up to Nef Anyo?
description: Eudico would do anything to keep her people safe, but will she stand up to Nef Anyo?

name: Whispers In The Walls
summary: Loid has had strange dreams and desperately needs to show you something.
description: Loid has had strange dreams and desperately needs to show you something.
